creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene M. Zheganin from comment #3)
If you have problems with portmaster, I suggest you contact the maintainer of portmaster.
Portmaster and portupgrade are nice tools, but they have one big problem, they build the package in a not clean environment which can cause problems.
Both a third party tools.

If you would like to use a more official one, use the FreeBSD pkg database where you can download already prepackaged packages or build your own packages using poudriere. This is also the tool I test all packages with.

Doing it this way, you can test the packages at first in a test environment and then redo it in production environment without the risk it fails in PRD if test was fine.
